param.name: select_process
param.label: Select process
param.option: calculate-band: Performs a calculation with bands.
plot-image: Plots an image with colors.
select-products-sentinel2: Searches the specified catalog for Sentinel-2 products matching filtering criteria.

param.name: name
param.label: Output file name
param.help: Name to apply for the output GeoTiff file.

param.name: calc
param.label: Calculation
param.help: Calculation to perform with band references.

param.name: product_url
param.label: S3 URL to a Sentinel-2 product in SAFE format.

param.name: s3_access_key
param.label: S3 access key required to retrieve products hosted on a protected S3 location.
param.help: Access key to Copernicus data provider. See https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/Registration.html and https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html#generate-secrets for details.

param.name: s3_secret_key
param.label: S3 secret key required to retrieve products hosted on a protected S3 location.
param.help: Secret key to Copernicus data provider. See https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/Registration.html and https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html#generate-secrets for details.

param.name: resolution_Array_text
param.label: resolution
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.

param.name: debug_Array_boolean
param.label: debug
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type boolean here.

param.name: input_image
param.label: input_image
param.help: Image to map with the colors bins.

param.name: color_scale
param.label: Color mappings to bin scales to apply to the image.
param.help: JSON-like array with each item being an array of 2 elements, the first for the bin scale value and the second for the RGB color. Each RGB value can be either a [0-1] floating point or a [0-255] integer. Example: '[ [0, [0,0,0]], [20, [0,0,255]], [50, [255,100,0]] ]'

param.name: output_name_Array_text
param.label: output_name
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.

param.name: plot_name_Array_text
param.label: plot_name
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.

param.name: plot_title_Array_text
param.label: plot_title
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.

param.name: output_dimensions_Array_integer
param.label: output_dimensions
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type integer here.

param.name: output_resolution_Array_integer
param.label: output_resolution
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type integer here.

param.name: output_name
param.label: Output file name
param.help: Name to apply for the output GeoTiff file.

param.name: date
param.label: Central date
param.help: Date around which ±delta-days will be applied for search. If omitted, 'Time of interest' input must be provided instead.

param.name: toi_Array_text
param.label: Time of interest
param.help: Start and end date-time strings. Must be provided if 'date' input is omitted. Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.

param.name: aoi
param.label: Area of interest
param.help: Polygon defining the area of interest.

param.name: product_level
param.label: Product level
param.help: Please provide comma-seperated values of type text here.
